calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Carla Trigueros, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Kiera K. Simpson and Anyssa R. Simpson, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and proof of service on notice of the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor.
Petitioner stated to the court that service was performed by her sister, but her sister is not present and did not have Proof of Service with her.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of today's hearing date with the court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court conditionlly grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Kiera K. Trigueros and Anyssa R. Trigueros.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Off Calendar
